title: Iran and US Move Towards Agreement to End War
summary: Iran is reviewing a US proposal, with sources indicating progress towards a memo aimed at ending the conflict.

title: Jeffrey Epstein's Suicide Note Released
summary: A federal judge releases Jeffrey Epstein's purported suicide note, adding another layer to the controversial case.

title: Ted Turner, CNN Founder, Dies at 87

title: Republicans Seek Funding for Trump's Ballroom Security

title: Israel Strikes Beirut, Violating Ceasefire

title: Judge Denies Request to Return 2020 Ballots in Georgia
